2023-24 Charlotte 49ers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 19-12 (13-5, 3rd in AAC MBB)

Coach: Aaron Fearne

PS/G: 68.7 (305th of 362)

PA/G: 65.6 (21st of 362)

SRS: 4.09 (114th of 362)

SOS: 2.42 (108th of 362)

ORtg: 108.1 (140th of 362)

DRtg: 103.2 (161st of 362)
